```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;margin-bottom:1em;line-height:1.5;">The only requirement is a <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#564232;">SKILL.md</code>. Everything beside it is optional, and takes a few recurring shapes.</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.2em 1fr;gap:0.85em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Start minimal</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">One <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;">SKILL.md</code> is enough to begin.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.2em 1fr;gap:0.85em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="anchor" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Pin the deterministic parts</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Templates and scripts keep what must hold still.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.2em 1fr;gap:0.85em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(196,136,26,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #FAE9C8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="layers" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Bundle workflows</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">One skill can hold many abilities under one theme.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.2em 1fr;gap:0.85em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(58,125,201,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="bot" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Nest other agents</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Delegate the task your agent is weak at.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
